3144960.name: Fantasy Grounds - Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 3: Midnight Sun
3144960.description:
Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 3: Midnight Sun

Fierce sea wolves sail their dragon-prowed longboats over the dark waves, and the midnight sun rises above the frozen northern isles! 
The third issue of Cursed Scroll Zine adds the stark isles of the north to your TTRPG game world! Inside you'll find: 
  • Hoard of the Sea Wolf King, a 0-level gauntlet adventure that takes fledgling crawlers in search of a lost treasure trove of a long-dead king!
  • The Isles of Andrik, mountainous islands ruled by drakes, warrior clans, and the enigmatic Old Gods.
  • Two new classes for Shadowdark RPG: seer and sea wolf
  • Rules for new spells, boats, swearing oaths, arctic sea encounters, and a raid into the unsuspecting Wortwick Monastery!
  • 12 new monsters, including the mythical Valkyrie, an angelic warrior who leads fallen heroes to the afterlife! 
  • Classic, hand-drawn maps and player-safe JPEGs for virtual table tops.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Michael Putlack, and Kevin Heffernan
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Shadowdark RPG ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
